source_pr.title: planner: use ExtraHandleColumn as PK when generating TablePath
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

Before this PR:
```
mysql> create table t(a int, b int);
Query OK, 0 rows affected (0.01 sec)

mysql> explain select * from t where a > 10 order by _tidb_rowid;
+-------------------------+----------+------+------------------------------------------------------------+
| id                      | count    | task | operator info                                              |
+-------------------------+----------+------+------------------------------------------------------------+
| Projection_6            | 3333.33  | root | test.t.a, test.t.b                                         |
| └─Sort_7                | 3333.33  | root | test.t._tidb_rowid:asc                                     |
|   └─TableReader_11      | 3333.33  | root | data:Selection_10                                          |
|     └─Selection_10      | 3333.33  | cop  | gt(test.t.a, 10)                                           |
|       └─TableScan_9     | 10000.00 | cop  | table:t, range:[-inf,+inf], keep order:false, stats:pseudo |
+-------------------------+----------+------+------------------------------------------------------------+
5 rows in set (0.00 sec)
```
After this PR:
```
mysql> explain select * from t where a > 10 order by _tidb_rowid;
+------------------------+-------+------+-----------------------------------------------------------+
| id                     | count | task | operator info                                             |
+------------------------+-------+------+-----------------------------------------------------------+
| Projection_6           | 1.33  | root | test.t.a, test.t.b                                        |
| └─TableReader_14       | 1.33  | root | data:Selection_13                                         |
|   └─Selection_13       | 1.33  | cop  | gt(test.t.a, 10)                                          |
|     └─TableScan_12     | 4.00  | cop  | table:t, range:[-inf,+inf], keep order:true, stats:pseudo |
+------------------------+-------+------+-----------------------------------------------------------+
4 rows in set (0.00 sec)
```
### What is changed and how it works?

This PR makes `getPKIsHandleCol()` return `ExtraHandleColumn` instead of `nil` when the table has no PK.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Release note

When the table uses `_tidb_rowid` as Handle, we can correctly generate a TableScan that can keep the order of `_tidb_rowid`.  For example, `select max(_tidb_rowid) from t` won't require a `Sort` anymore.

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("explain select * from t where a > 10 order by _tidb_rowid").Check(testkit.Rows( (executor/rowid_test.go)
failure_signature: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR changes planner behavior around `_tidb_rowid` keep-order plans, but no concrete intermittent flaky signature is provided in the case data.
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR is a planner/correctness change to treat `ExtraHandleColumn` as the handle for tables without a PK, affecting whether a `TableScan` can keep `_tidb_rowid` order (and related EXPLAIN output). The case data does not include a concrete intermittent failure signature or a targeted flaky-test stabilization change, so keep it as needs-more-evidence rather than guessing taxonomy.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("explain select * from t where a > 10 order by _tidb_rowid").Check(testkit.Rows( (executor/rowid_test.go)
